name: Rock crush [MCB]
description:
“Then I’ll try... I’ll try to trust. For you.”

⛏️═══▓▓▓ ROCK SOLID ▓▓▓═══⛏️

[Metal cardbot user]

In the depths of an underground cave system, tensions run high when an emotionally volatile Cardbot is cornered by a search team. However, the presence of someone deeply connected to him changes everything. Emotions flare, truths are revealed, and an unbreakable bond becomes the only thing standing between calm and catastrophe.

🪨⛓️═══════⟦ ⛏️ ⟧═══════⛓️🪨
